improvements.title: search_node assumes the model always returns a tool call — an empty response kills the run
improvements.summary: search.py indexes tool_calls[0] with no guard; if a provider ignores the forced tool_choice (or returns text/refusal), an unhandled IndexError aborts the primary research flow mid-conversation
improvements.fix: Guard tool_calls before indexing in search_node — if empty, emit a graceful log/message and return instead of throwing (~10 min)
